name: Webstar Technology Group Inc.
summary: PART I . The Company Webstar Technology Group, Inc. (the Company) was incorporated in Wyoming on March 10, 2015. The Company was originally established for the operation of certain licensed and purchased software solutions. Since inception, the Company signed two license agreements with a related party to license proprietary software technology solutions, i.e., Gigabyte Slayer and WARP-G. During the year ended December 31, 2024, the Company entered into several material definitive agreements as ...
